# Amazon Bedrock API Reference

## Service Endpoints

### 1. bedrock (Control Plane)
- Manages, trains, and deploys models
- Actions: Amazon Bedrock Actions
- Data Types: Amazon Bedrock Data Types

### 2. bedrock-runtime (Data Plane)
- Makes inference requests for models hosted in Amazon Bedrock
- Actions: Amazon Bedrock Runtime Actions
- Data Types: Amazon Bedrock Runtime Data Types

### 3. bedrock-agent (Control Plane)
- Creates and manages agents, knowledge bases, prompt management, and prompt flows
- Actions: Amazon Bedrock Agents Actions
- Data Types: Amazon Bedrock Agents Data Types

### 4. bedrock-agent-runtime (Data Plane)
- Invokes agents and flows; queries knowledge bases
- Actions: Amazon Bedrock Agents Runtime Actions
- Data Types: Amazon Bedrock Agents Runtime Data Types

## Supported SDKs
C++, Go, Java, JavaScript, Kotlin, .NET, PHP, Python (Boto3), Ruby, Rust, SAP ABAP, Swift

## CLI References
- Amazon Bedrock CLI commands
- Amazon Bedrock Runtime CLI commands
- Amazon Bedrock Agents CLI commands
- Amazon Bedrock Agents Runtime CLI commands

## Note
Last fetched: 2026-03-30. Static reference page, no changes detected.
